mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_rule_item (rule_id, room_id, channel_codes_json, door_group_ids_json, sort_order) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{roomId}, #{channelCodesJson}, #{doorGroupIdsJson}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_id AS ruleId, room_id AS roomId, channel_codes_json AS channelCodesJson, door_group_ids_json AS doorGroupIdsJson, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM access_rule_item WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.rule_id AS ruleId, i.room_id AS roomId, i.channel_codes_json AS channelCodesJson, i.door_group_ids_json AS doorGroupIdsJson, i.sort_order AS sortOrder FROM access_rule_item i INNER JOIN access_rule r ON r.id = i.rule_id AND r.enabled = 1 LEFT JOIN access_rule_item_user um ON um.item_id = i.id AND um.room_id = #{roomId} AND um.aro_user_id = #{aroUserId} WHERE i.room_id = #{roomId} AND ( um.id IS NOT NULL OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_rule_item_user ux WHERE ux.item_id = i.id ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN um.id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, i.sort_order ASC, i.id ASC LIMIT 1
